title: taraxacum subreduncum
intro: Taraxacum subreduncum, also known as lesser creeping dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family and is closely related to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subreduncum include its rich content of inulin, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum subreduncum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum subreduncum include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
